Description: Experience the magic of wild dolphins in their natural habitat! Our family-friendly cruises depart daily from Gulf Shores Marina. Expert naturalist guides 2-hour tours and guaranteed dolphin sightings or your next cruise is free!
Tags: dolphin cruise|family friendly|educational|watersports|sunset cruise|private charters available

ItemID: 2-hour guided dolphin watching cruise. Departs 9:00am and 11:30am daily. Guaranteed dolphin sightings! Includes complimentary bottled water.
2-hour guided dolphin watching cruise. Departs 2:00pm daily. Perfect for avoiding morning crowds. Includes complimentary bottled water.
2.5-hour cruise featuring dolphin watching and breathtaking Gulf Coast sunset. Departs Friday-Sunday at 6:30pm. Includes complimentary wine and cheese.
3-hour cruise with marine biology lesson hands-on activities for kids. Perfect for school groups and families. Includes educational materials and snacks.
Private boat charter for up to 6 passengers. Choose your departure time. Perfect for special occasions birthdays or intimate gatherings.
Extended private charter for up to 6 passengers. Includes dolphin watching snorkeling and beach exploration. Lunch provided.

EventID: Children under 4 ride free. Children 4-12 receive discounted pricing. All children must be accompanied by an adult.
Free cancellation up to 24 hours before departure. Cancellations within 24 hours are non-refundable. We reserve the right to cancel cruises due to weather.
Bring sunscreen hat sunglasses and camera. Light jacket recommended for evening cruises. Coolers allowed (no glass containers).
Wheelchair accessible. Please notify us at booking if you require special assistance.
Free parking at Gulf Shores Marina. Parking lot entrance on Marina Drive.
We guarantee you'll see dolphins or your next cruise is FREE! (99% success rate)
